---
name: Product enhancement proposal
about: Propose a scoped product or engineering enhancement
title: "[Enhancement]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem To Solve

What reviewer, maintainer, or product-quality problem would this solve?

## Proposed Enhancement

Describe the smallest useful change.

## Product Value

Explain how this improves reviewer control, traceability, maintainability, enterprise readiness, or product clarity.

## Scope

List the expected files, modules, docs, or product surfaces affected.

## Explicit Non-goals

- [ ] Does not add autonomous research or monitoring
- [ ] Does not provide investment advice, legal advice, trading recommendations, or forecasts
- [ ] Does not bypass reviewer evidence acceptance
- [ ] Does not change Decision Brief logic unless explicitly approved
- [ ] Does not require a database, cloud service, microservice, or external framework unless separately justified

## Alternatives Considered

What simpler documentation, UX, or engineering option could address the same problem?

## Validation Approach

How should maintainers verify the change?

## Risks Or Open Questions

List known uncertainty, technical debt, or product-boundary concerns.
